description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a symmetrical facade and a gable roof. The front of the house has a covered porch supported by columns, and the entryway is flanked by two palm trees. Large windows are arranged in even rows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella, as well as several trees for landscaping. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a combination of white and gray surfaces and wooden accents on the balcony railings.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a covered porch, and a backyard pool area with landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, two palm trees, driveway, and a car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the symmetrical window arrangement along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central door, steps, and flanked by palm trees
